description: You are a cinematographer setting up a dramatic rack focus shot for a product commercial in Blender. Create a smooth rack focus animation using the camera 'RackFocusCam' where the focus transitions from the 'ForegroundObject' (red cone) at frame 1 to the 'BackgroundObject' (blue torus) at frame 60. Configure the camera with a shallow depth of field to produce visible bokeh. Set the timeline frame range from 1 to 60. Render frame 1 to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/rack_focus_frame01.png, render frame 60 to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/rack_focus_frame60.png, and save the project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/rack_focus.blend.
